summary: A comprehensive health insurance product that rewards customers for starting young, offering features like M-iracle coverage for maternity and related expenses, Booster+ for carrying forward unused sum insured, Lock the Clock+ for age-based premium savings, and various optional benefits including worldwide coverage and OPD benefits.
coverage: Base Sum Insured: INR 3 Lakh to 1 Crore
Road & Air Ambulance up to sum insured
Hospitalisation expenses for 2+ hours (24+ hours for AYUSH treatment)
Modern treatments up to sum insured
Home Care/Domiciliary up to sum insured
Organ Donor coverage up to sum insured
ReAssure Forever: Unlimited coverage after first claim
M-iracle: Maternity, IVF, adoption, surrogacy coverage
Second Medical Opinion: Unlimited times per policy year
waiting_periods: All Base Waiting Periods apply on WellConsult
co_pay: Borderless benefit: Co-payment applicable as per policy schedule
Tiered Network: 20% co-payment if treatment taken in non-Tiered Network Hospital
deductible: Annual Aggregate Deductible options: INR 20,000 / INR 30,000 / INR 50,000 / INR 1,00,000
claims_information: Pre-authorisation processed within 30 minutes for active policies

faqs.question: What is the product name and UIN?
faqs.answer: The product name is Aspire with UIN: NBHHLIP24129V012324

faqs.question: What are the available base sum insured options?
faqs.answer: Base sum insured options are INR 3 Lakh, 5 Lakh, 7.5 Lakh, 10 Lakh, 15 Lakh, 20 Lakh, 25 Lakh, 50 Lakh, and 1 Crore

faqs.question: What is M-iracle coverage?
faqs.answer: M-iracle covers expenses around maternity, IVF, adoption, surrogacy and more, covered up to M-iracle sum insured

faqs.question: What are the M-iracle waiting periods for different variants?
faqs.answer: Gold+: 48 months, Diamond+: 24 months, Platinum+: 9 months, Titanium+: 9 months

faqs.question: What is Booster+ benefit?
faqs.answer: Booster+ allows you to carry forward unutilised Base sum insured to the next policy year. Limits vary by entry age: 18-35 years up to 10X, 36-45 years up to 5X, 46+ years up to 3X for Platinum+ and Titanium+

faqs.question: What is Lock the Clock+ feature?
faqs.answer: Lock the Clock+ allows you to pay premium as per your entry age until a claim is paid. M-iracle claims will not impact the age lock. Available only in Titanium+ variant

faqs.question: How long is the minimum hospitalisation required for coverage?
faqs.answer: Minimum 2+ hours of hospitalisation is required for coverage (24+ hours for AYUSH treatment)

faqs.question: What is the pre and post hospitalisation coverage period?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalisation: 60 days and post-hospitalisation: 180 days, both covered up to sum insured

faqs.question: What is Fast Forward add-on?
faqs.answer: Fast Forward allows you to combine multi-tenure sum insured to be used anytime, applicable for Base and M-iracle sum insured. Available for policies with 2 & 3 years tenure only

faqs.question: What is Cash-Bag benefit?
faqs.answer: Cash-Bag accumulates cashback on every claim-free year - 10% of 1st renewal premium and 5% of subsequent renewal premiums. Can be used to pay for premiums, deductible, co-payment, and OPD

faqs.question: What is Borderless coverage?
faqs.answer: Borderless provides treatment coverage anywhere in the world, up to sum insured, with applicable co-payment as per policy schedule

faqs.question: What co-payment options are available?
faqs.answer: Co-payment options available are 0%, 20%, 30%, 40%, and 50%

faqs.question: What is ReAssure Forever benefit?
faqs.answer: ReAssure Forever triggers after the 1st claim and provides unlimited coverage. Each claim will be up to the Base sum insured

faqs.question: What is Live Healthy discount?
faqs.answer: Live Healthy provides up to 30% discount on premium at the time of renewal

faqs.question: How many times can I avail Second Medical Opinion?
faqs.answer: Second Medical Opinion can be availed unlimited times in a policy year within the network only

faqs.question: What is WellConsult OPD coverage?
faqs.answer: WellConsult provides comprehensive coverage for Tele & Physical Consultations, Diagnostics, Pharmacy, Gym Membership, and wellness benefits

faqs.question: What are the Hospital Daily Cash benefits?
faqs.answer: Up to INR 5 Lakh base sum insured: INR 1,000/day; Between INR 7.5-15 Lakh: INR 2,000/day; Above 15 Lakh: INR 4,000/day. Minimum 24 hours continuous hospitalisation required, maximum 30 days per policy year

faqs.question: What Personal Accident coverage options are available?
faqs.answer: Personal Accident coverage can be chosen from 1X, 2X, 3X, 4X, or 5X of base sum insured, with maximum up to INR 1 Crore

faqs.question: What deductible options are available?
faqs.answer: Annual Aggregate Deductible options are INR 20,000, INR 30,000, INR 50,000, and INR 1,00,000

faqs.question: How fast is the cashless claim processing?
faqs.answer: Niva Bupa processes cashless claims within 30 minutes for all active policies, subject to receiving all required documents

faqs.question: How many network hospitals are available?
faqs.answer: There are 10,000+ network hospitals available

faqs.question: What is Future Ready benefit?
faqs.answer: Future Ready provides guaranteed issuance and continuity on waiting periods served by you for your future spouse

faqs.question: What is Tiered Network rider?
faqs.answer: Tiered Network provides 15% discount on premium, but 20% co-payment applies if treatment is taken in a non-Tiered Network Hospital

faqs.question: What are the WellConsult Tele-consultation benefits?
faqs.answer: WellConsult provides unlimited tele and video consultations with general physicians anytime through the Niva Bupa Health App

faqs.question: What is the Physical Consultation Wallet limit in WellConsult?
faqs.answer: Physical Consultation Wallet provides coverage up to INR 10,000 for consultations with specialists or general physicians, with 20% co-payment for reimbursement

faqs.question: What is the Diagnostic Wallet coverage in WellConsult?
faqs.answer: Diagnostic Wallet provides coverage for prescribed diagnostic tests up to INR 10,000, available on both cashless and reimbursement basis with 20% co-payment

faqs.question: What is the Pharmacy Wallet limit in WellConsult?
faqs.answer: Pharmacy Wallet provides coverage for prescribed medicines up to INR 2,500, available on both cashless and reimbursement basis with 20% co-payment

faqs.question: What wellness benefits are included in WellConsult?
faqs.answer: WellConsult includes gym access for 2 days per week per adult, unlimited fitness and diet-nutrition sessions, and 10 cashless emotional wellness sessions through the app

faqs.question: What is Safeguard+ benefit?
faqs.answer: Safeguard+ includes Claim Safeguard+ (covers non-payable items), Booster+ Safeguard+ (no impact on Booster+ if claim is less than INR 1,00,000), and Sum insured Safeguard+ (inflation-linked increase in base sum insured)

faqs.question: What customer service options are available?
faqs.answer: 24X7 customer service is available with helpline numbers 1860-500-8888 and 1800-309-3333, along with website www.nivabupa.com
